cted, then there will be unexpected troubles & failure in
service & business.
11th bhava : 12th lord the 11th bhava, causes loss of wealth, troubles & unhappiness from friends
& troubles to children.
12th bhava : 12th lord in the 12th bhava causes loss of wealth and fear of enemies. Even it this
lord is strong & well-aspected it will not give the desired good but it is a significator of
happiness & growth. This period is good for religious growth & meditation. It brings in
opportunities to do good religious activities and to reduce the burden of our past deeds. During
this period one gives charity in the name of ancestors and conducts religious activities.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
50

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
